meaning: adj.寒冷的,冷淡的,(妇女)缺乏性感的
examples: A snowstorm hit the West today, bringing with it frigid temperatures.
Less solar energy is lost in evaporation at the frigid poles than in the tropics.
There was a frigid atmosphere in the room.
This frigid state is required for the instrument's detectors to sample the faintest of infrared sources.
Once the detectors start to warm from their ultra-frigid state, they will stop working.
